'''âzh-l-ng''' ('''kazhalang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantitate|quantitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantitate|quantitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-l-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kazhalang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhalang|thizhalang]] || [[word:jizhalang|jizhalang]] || [[word:shizhalang|shizhalang]] || [[word:kizhalang|kizhalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhalang|thuthuzhalang]] || [[word:jujuzhalang|jujuzhalang]] || [[word:shushuzhalang|shushuzhalang]] || [[word:kukuzhalang|kukuzhalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhalang|thuzhalang]] || [[word:juzhalang|juzhalang]] || [[word:shuzhalang|shuzhalang]] || [[word:kuzhalang|kuzhalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhalang|thuzhalang]] || [[word:juzhalang|juzhalang]] || [[word:shuzhalang|shuzhalang]] || [[word:kuzhalang|kuzhalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhalang|thezhalang]] || [[word:jezhalang|jezhalang]] || [[word:shezhalang|shezhalang]] || [[word:kezhalang|kezhalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhalang|thothozhalang]] || [[word:jojozhalang|jojozhalang]] || [[word:shoshozhalang|shoshozhalang]] || [[word:kokozhalang|kokozhalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhalang|thozhalang]] || [[word:jozhalang|jozhalang]] || [[word:shozhalang|shozhalang]] || [[word:kozhalang|kozhalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhalang|thozhalang]] || [[word:jozhalang|jozhalang]] || [[word:shozhalang|shozhalang]] || [[word:kozhalang|kozhalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhalang|thĂŠzhalang]] || [[word:jĂŠzhalang|jĂŠzhalang]] || [[word:shĂŠzhalang|shĂŠzhalang]] || [[word:kĂŠzhalang|kĂŠzhalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhalang|thathazhalang]] || [[word:jajazhalang|jajazhalang]] || [[word:shashazhalang|shashazhalang]] || [[word:kakazhalang|kakazhalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhalang|thazhalang]] || [[word:jazhalang|jazhalang]] || [[word:shazhalang|shazhalang]] || [[word:kazhalang|kazhalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhalang|thazhalang]] || [[word:jazhalang|jazhalang]] || [[word:shazhalang|shazhalang]] || [[word:kazhalang|kazhalang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhalang|shazhalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhalang|goshazhalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhalang|gokishazhalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhalangnĂŒ|shazhalangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhalangnknĂŒ|goshazhalangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhalangnĂŒ|gokishazhalangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhalangshĂ«|shazhalangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkshĂ«|goshazhalangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhalangshĂ«|gokishazhalangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhalangro|shazhalangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkro|goshazhalangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhalangro|gokishazhalangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhalangmu|shazhalangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkmu|goshazhalangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhalangmu|gokishazhalangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhalangsher|shazhalangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhalangnksher|goshazhalangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhalangsher|gokishazhalangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhalang|shazhalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkng|goshazhalangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhalang|gokishazhalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhalangya|shazhalangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkya|goshazhalangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhalangya|gokishazhalangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhalangyam|shazhalangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkyam|goshazhalangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhalangyam|gokishazhalangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhalangnĂŒshĂ«|shazhalangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhalangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhalangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhalangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhalangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhalangnĂŒro|shazhalangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhalangnknĂŒro|goshazhalangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhalangnĂŒro|gokishazhalangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhalangnĂŒmu|shazhalangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhalangnknĂŒmu|goshazhalangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhalangnĂŒmu|gokishazhalangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhalangshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhalangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhalangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhalangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhalangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhalangshĂ«ro|shazhalangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkshĂ«ro|goshazhalangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhalangshĂ«ro|gokishazhalangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhalangshĂ«mu|shazhalangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkshĂ«mu|goshazhalangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhalangshĂ«mu|gokishazhalangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhalangronĂŒ|shazhalangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkronĂŒ|goshazhalangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhalangronĂŒ|gokishazhalangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhalangroshĂ«|shazhalangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkroshĂ«|goshazhalangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhalangroshĂ«|gokishazhalangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhalangromu|shazhalangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkromu|goshazhalangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhalangromu|gokishazhalangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhalangmunĂŒ|shazhalangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkmunĂŒ|goshazhalangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhalangmunĂŒ|gokishazhalangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhalangmushĂ«|shazhalangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkmushĂ«|goshazhalangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhalangmushĂ«|gokishazhalangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhalangmuro|shazhalangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhalangnkmuro|goshazhalangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhalangmuro|gokishazhalangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
